summary: ANDROID | FALCON | DFU - After succesful DFU previous FW version is displayed on Home page and settings page
scenario: Firmware version displayed on Home page and Device Settings page does not update after DFU until app restart
description_clean: After a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update), the previous firmware version is still displayed on the Home page and device settings page. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Note the current firmware version displayed for the connected device.
3. Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. Wait for the DFU to complete successfully (device reboots and reconnects).
5. Observe the firmware version displayed on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] and observe the firmware version displayed there.
7. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Reopen the app and navigate to the Home screen and Device Settings → [Device Name] again.
expected: After a successful DFU, the updated firmware version should be displayed immediately on both the Home screen and Device Settings page without requiring an app restart.
actual: After a successful DFU, the previous (old) firmware version is still displayed on the Home screen and Device Settings page. The correct (updated) firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
